arts.sum: According to information from Footy Headlines, Jordan's partnership with PSG could end after the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Ex-Man Utd Coach Discusses Potential Marcus Rashford Sale Amid PSG Rumors
arts.sum: Now that Ruben Amorim is in charge, Marcus Rashford’s future at Manchester United may be determined during the 2024-25 season. Amid the transfer exit rumors, a former Manchester United coach believes the Englishmen shouldn’t be sold. Last month, TEAMtalk revealed that Paris Saint-Germain had reignited their interest in Rashford. arts.ttl: Dayot Upamecano stresses importance of Bayern Munich getting a result vs PSG
arts.sum: With PSG in Europe being the first hurdle to clear of this difficult stretch for Bayern, center back Dayot Upamecano, who’s partnership with Kim min-Jae continues to get more and more solid this season, stressed the importance of needing a result against the reigning Ligue 1 champions, who have also struggled in Europe this season. If you only looked at current form, it would be rather difficult to guess that Bayern Munich had lost to both Aston Villa and Barcelona in the Champions League earlier in the season, but that is a matter a fact despite how high they are currently flying.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Suffer Setback as Transfer Target Commits to PSG Despite Limited Minutes
arts.sum: More information is emerging about Paris Saint-Germain midfielder Désiré Doué and whether he is satisfied with his first few months at the club after joining the Ligue 1 champions this past summer. Doué completed a €50 million transfer to the Parc des Princes from Stade Rennais, turning down interest from Bayern Munich. arts.ttl: When is Bayern - PSG? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Bayern - PSG will be played on Tuesday November 26 at Allianz Arena with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT. Form guide for Bayern - PSG

arts.ttl: Liverpool, PSG Set for January Boost as Ligue 1 Club Open to Sale of in-Form Star
arts.sum: This month, Olympique Lyonnais received a major financial sanction from the DNCG (Direction Nationale du Contrôle de Gestion), placing the club in a tough financial spot. However, don’t expect a fire sale in the January transfer window. arts.ttl: PSG in 'difficult' spot against heavyweights Bayern
arts.sum: PSG manager Luis Enrique said on Monday that his team have put themselves in a "difficult" spot with a slow start to their Champions League campaign.

arts.ttl: PSG’s Milan Škriniar agrees to join Juventus
arts.sum: PSG centre-back Milan Škriniar (29) has agreed to join Juventus, according to a report this Monday from Foot Mercato. The Slovakia international has fallen down the pecking order at Luis…

arts.ttl: Scorching hot Harry Kane wants Bayern Munich win over PSG badly
arts.sum: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane knows that his squad needs a win in the Champions League given its placement in the standings. Finally, Kane recently found himself in the crosshairs of Didi Hamann, who said Kane does not score enough in important games for Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Juventus, PSG Outcast Reach Verbal Agreement for Transfer Move Amid Ongoing Talks
arts.sum: Milan Škriniar has been moved to a backup role at Paris Saint-Germain, with manager Luis Enrique opting for Willian Pacho and Marquinhos as his starting center-backs. Nonetheless, it appears the veteran defender might be on the way out in a few weeks.
